properties.notes: Rezoning voided by VA Court of Appeals Mar 2026; QTS appeal to VA Supreme Court pending

properties.name: Project Sail (Newnan)
properties.notes: Coweta County 3-2 rezoning April 2026 challenged by lawsuit filed May 5 2026

properties.name: Project Delta
properties.notes: Stokes County rezoning voided Mar 2026 after lawsuit; developer can resubmit

properties.name: Bessemer Hyperscale Campus
properties.notes: Council approved Nov 2025; 900-acre expansion rezoning pending plus active TRO lawsuit filed Apr 2026

properties.name: Stratos Project
properties.notes: Box Elder County approved May 2026 but MIDA permits plus 30-day public comment plus phase-by-phase approval still pending

properties.name: Slavic Village Campus
properties.notes: Permit application rejected by city May 14 2026; developer weighing appeal/resubmission

properties.name: Comanche Circle
properties.notes: Hood County 4-1 conditional approval Jan 2026 contingent on detailed plan submission

properties.name: Project Bluestem
properties.notes: Leavenworth County 90-day moratorium in effect; no formal application yet filed

properties.name: AWS Calvert Cliffs Campus
properties.notes: Calvert County pursuing 24-month moratorium; no formal AWS application yet

properties.name: Remington Innovation Campus
properties.notes: Fauquier County comprehensive plan and zoning map amendment pending

properties.name: Martindale-Brightwood
properties.notes: Indy MDC 6-2 rezoning April 2026 under legal challenge alleging environmental racism

properties.name: Project Spring
properties.notes: Council 6-1 rezoning Feb 2026 challenged by lawsuit and recall petition

properties.name: Gemini Sioux Falls
properties.notes: Council 7-0 rezoning Jan 2026 facing citizen referendum signature drive

properties.name: Clarksdale Coahoma Site
properties.notes: Board rezoning Mar 2026 was conditional only; no application yet filed

properties.name: Caroline SAC III Campus
properties.notes: SPEX-08-2025 special exception permit under Caroline County review in 2026

properties.name: Tarboro Edgecombe Campus
properties.notes: Tarboro town SUP rejected 7-1 Sep 2025; county-level approval pending separately

properties.name: Chestnut Commerce Center
properties.notes: Ravenna passed 1-year moratorium Apr 2026 with Shalersville extending 6-month pause

properties.name: Holyoke MGHPCC Adjacent
properties.notes: Holyoke data-center zoning ordinance up for Council vote April 2026

properties.name: Lockport Hyperscale
properties.notes: Six-hour Dec 2025 hearing on proposed data-center zoning district; vote pending amid statewide moratorium proposal

properties.name: Spotsylvania SUP Proposal
properties.notes: Spotsylvania Board to reconsider mandatory SUP regime after Jan 2026 seat change

properties.name: Charles City Diode Campus
properties.notes: 515-acre rezoning under Planning Commission and Board of Supervisors review

properties.name: Berry Hill Megasite
properties.notes: $73B Pittsylvania County campus performance agreement still requires county adoption; community meetings ongoing

properties.name: Frederick CDI Referendum
properties.notes: CDI overlay-zone map approved Dec 2025 but residents pursuing referendum to overturn

properties.name: Prometheus Hyperscale Natrona
properties.notes: Natrona County not adopting fast-track resolution; standard zoning siting exemptions pending

properties.name: Stargate Saline Township
properties.notes: MPSC conditional approval Dec 2025 but multiple environmental permits and zoning lawsuit still pending

properties.name: Buckeystown Quantum Aligned
properties.notes: Aligned re-engaging after MD generator rule change; site plans pending county review

properties.name: Hill County Pause Sites
properties.notes: Hill County 1-year moratorium May 2026 freezing several pending applications

properties.name: xAI Southaven Expansion
properties.notes: Southaven residents petitioning against unpermitted gas turbines; MDEQ permits pending

properties.name: Project Yellow
properties.notes: $25B AWS expansion includes Hinds County phase still pending state and county approvals

properties.name: Project Matador
properties.notes: Rick Perry co-founded Fermi America; campus publicly branded the President Donald J. Trump Advanced Energy & Intelligence Campus. First 6 GW air permit granted Feb 2026 but remaining 5 GW air permits plus NRC approval for four AP1000 reactors plus anchor hyperscaler tenant all pending after CEO Toby Neugebauer's April 2026 exit

properties.name: Hassayampa Ranch
properties.notes: Chamath Palihapitiya-backed $25B campus with developer Anita Verma-Lallian. Maricopa County industrial-use rezoning passed Dec 2025 but detailed zoning application plus site-plan SUP plus final design review still pending in 2026

properties.name: DAMAC Edgerton
properties.notes: Hussain Sajwani-backed (longtime Trump business partner) first US Edgnex site at Logistics Park KC. Edgerton Planning Commission tabled the application 2-2 May 12 2026 pending noise-level and expansion-plan details

properties.name: Fort Bliss Carlyle Campus
properties.notes: David Rubenstein-co-founded Carlyle was conditionally picked March 2026 to build a 1384-acre 3 GW Army hyperscale campus. Army Corps NEPA environmental review and final definitive agreement with Carlyle both still pending

properties.name: Dugway CyrusOne Campus
properties.notes: Larry Fink-led BlackRock plus KKR's Henry Kravis are controlling owners of CyrusOne which was conditionally selected March 2026 for a 1201-acre Army hyperscale campus at Dugway Proving Ground. Army Corps environmental review and final negotiations still pending

properties.name: SB Energy Portsmouth
properties.notes: Masayoshi Son-led SoftBank campus championed at March 2026 groundbreaking by Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick. 9.2 GW of natural-gas generation and transmission interconnections still require Ohio Power Siting Board approval and public environmental review through 2026

properties.name: Beacon Point
properties.notes: Eric Trump-fronted American Bitcoin (Hut 8 majority-owned subsidiary; Eric Trump co-founder and CSO) is affiliated tenant. First 352 MW lease secured May 2026 with Q1 2027 energization but full 1 GW Nueces County buildout plus water-use permits plus final state grid sign-off still pending

properties.name: Bolt West Texas
properties.operator: Bolt Data & Energy / Texas Pacific Land
properties.notes: Eric Schmidt is co-founder and chairman of Bolt Data & Energy which signed a Dec 2025 strategic agreement with Texas Pacific Land Corp to develop 1 GW initial / 10 GW eventual capacity on TPL's 882k-acre Reeves County-area Permian footprint. No specific site has received county zoning approval and no anchor hyperscaler tenant has been announced
